category_title: Students with CHARGE syndrome exhibiting challenging behaviors (kicking, biting, scratching) to escape tasks or due to lack of structure
scenario_title: Table-top activities and task comprehension difficulties
minimal_context: David is in the classroom presented with a table-top object sorting activity.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: (Places a pile of mixed objects on the table) It is time to sort the objects.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Grinds his teeth and engages in visual self-stimulatory behavior instead of starting the task)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: (Points to the objects) Keep trying, put them in the right spots.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Stands up from the table and begins jumping)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: (Taps the table) Sit down and finish your table-top activity.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Scratches the tutor's arm and kicks the table, exhibiting problematic behaviors to escape the activity)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: (Places a pile of mixed objects on the table) It is time to sort the objects.

STUDENT: (Grinds his teeth and engages in visual self-stimulatory behavior instead of starting the task)

TUTOR: (Points to the objects) Keep trying, put them in the right spots.

STUDENT: (Stands up from the table and begins jumping)

TUTOR: (Taps the table) Sit down and finish your table-top activity.

STUDENT: (Scratches the tutor's arm and kicks the table, exhibiting problematic behaviors to escape the activity)

task.content: completing table-top activities such as puzzles, sorting objects, and tracing
task.learning_goal: programming that used principles of direct and systematic instruction

context.materials: table-top activities such as puzzles, sorting objects, and tracing; visual symbols; single leers or shapes; 12-point print

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When David has diﬃculty with a task or activity
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: exhibit problematic behaviors... kicking, biting, scratching

behavior_patterns.condition: When David does not comprehend task demands
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: exhibit problematic behaviors... jumping, teeth grinding, visual self-stimulatory behavior
